title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters s.

title: Infinite Loop Tester
description: A program that loops infinitely. Used to verify Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) detection.

title: Fork Bomb Tester
description: A program that recursively spawns processes. Used to verify process limit (PID limit) constraints.

title: Memory Leak Tester
description: A program that allocates large amounts of memory. Used to verify Memory Limit Exceeded (MLE) detection.

title: Runtime Error Tester
description: A program that crashes or exits with a non-zero status code. Used to verify Runtime Error (RE) detection.
